items.title: Adam Silver said that Caitlin Clark has "become a bit of a political football in this country."
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
Adam Silver said that Caitlin Clark has "become a bit of a political football in this country." 

He said the recent officiating stories about her are not about the ref issues. He said the WNBA needs to improve its officiating.

Silver: "I don’t think that’s fair to her."

items.title: Count Adam Silver among those waiting on LeBron James to pick a team, he said at CNBC event.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
Count Adam Silver among those waiting on LeBron James to pick a team, he said at CNBC event.

“We have to finish up the schedule and where LeBron plays affects the schedule... It will influence how we set the schedule — opening week, Christmas. So I need him to make a decision.”

items.title: Fox says the Argentina-England game averaged 15.06 million viewers. Most watched World Cup semifinal in U.S. TV history. Excellent number.
items.author: Richard Deitsch
items.body_excerpt:
Fox says the Argentina-England game averaged 15.06 million viewers. Most watched World Cup semifinal in U.S. TV history. Excellent number.

Previous high for the men: France-Morocco averaged 6.59 million viewers in 2022. (Caveats are time of day (2PM ET kick in 2022) and new Nielsen methodology.)
